# daytona_organization_otel_config (Resource)

Manages OpenTelemetry export configuration for a Daytona organization. Requires the organization API (an access token / JWT); API-key auth is rejected. Header values are write-only: Daytona redacts them on read, so the configured values are kept in state and drift in header values cannot be detected.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "daytona_organization_otel_config" "example" {
  organization_id = "organization-id"
  endpoint        = "https://otel.example.com/v1/traces"

  headers = {
    Authorization = "Bearer token"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `endpoint` (String) OpenTelemetry collector endpoint.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID.

### Optional

- `headers` (Map of String, Sensitive) Optional OpenTelemetry request headers.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Daytona organization ID for the OpenTelemetry configuration.
